title: heliophila rimicola
intro: Heliophila rimicola, also known as the "antelope's horn" or "silver heliophila", is a plant species that belongs to the genus Heliophila, which is a group of flowering plants native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Heliophila rimicola include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
